name: Unmount Volumes
description: Releases host-side volume mounts that were set up during pre_start so `pct start` can mount them into the container. Runs in the pre_start_finalize phase which is reserved for framework cleanup — addons cannot inject into this phase, so the unmount is guaranteed to be the last action before container start.

parameters.name: ID of the LXC Container
parameters.description: Container whose mpN volumes should be unmounted from the host.
